import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let trimmed = string.trim(s)
    match string.parse_int(trimmed)
    when Some(n)
      let total = n * (n + 1) / 2
      print("sum=#{total}")
    when None
      print("sum=0")
    end
  when None
    print("sum=0")
  end
end
